# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-067](task-0134): Provider Data Quality Rules

## Purpose

Implement provider data quality rules.

## Scope

- Quality rules
- Evaluation
- Reporting

## Implementation

1. Define rules
2. Implement evaluation
3. Add reporting

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Rules defined
2. Evaluation works
3. Reports generated
